description: Enable continuous iMessage sync via tray icon, auto-launch on login, and sleep prevention to ensure PRM always captures messages

decisions.tray_icon: System tray with context menu (show/hide, sync now, quit)
decisions.dock_visibility: Hide from dock when minimized to tray, show when window open
decisions.sleep_prevention: Use powerSaveBlocker during active sync, allow sleep between syncs
decisions.auto_launch: Opt-in via settings, launches hidden to tray

documentation.title: Electron Tray API
documentation.reason: Creating system tray icon and context menu

reference_repos.description: Electron tray app pattern with hide to tray

tasks.description: Create tray icon asset and tray manager module
steps: Create apps/electron/resources/trayIcon.png (16x16 + 32x32 @2x) - simple icon that works in light/dark mode
Create apps/electron/resources/trayIconTemplate.png for macOS template image
Create apps/electron/src/main/tray.ts with TrayManager class
Export TrayManager from main/index.ts
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
Import Tray, Menu, nativeImage from electron in tray.ts
Create TrayManager.create() method that initializes tray with icon
Add context menu items: Show PRM, Sync Now (separator), Preferences, Quit
Add tray.on('click') handler to toggle window visibility on macOS
Add tray.setToolTip('PRM - Syncing') with dynamic status
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Integrate tray with main window lifecycle
steps: In index.ts, call TrayManager.create() in app.whenReady()
Change window close behavior: hide to tray instead of close on macOS
Add mainWindow.on('close', (e) => { e.preventDefault(); mainWindow.hide() })
Wire 'Show PRM' menu item to mainWindow.show() and mainWindow.focus()
Wire 'Quit' menu item to app.quit()
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
Create apps/electron/src/main/power.ts with PowerManager class
Import powerSaveBlocker and powerMonitor from electron
Add startPreventingSleep() using powerSaveBlocker.start('prevent-app-suspension')
Add stopPreventingSleep() to release the blocker
Add isPreventingSleep() status check
Store blocker ID to prevent duplicate blockers
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
In PowerManager, add setupSleepWakeHandlers() method
Listen to powerMonitor.on('suspend') - log and emit event
Listen to powerMonitor.on('resume') - log and emit event
Export events via IPC: 'power:suspend' and 'power:resume'
Call setupSleepWakeHandlers() in PowerManager constructor
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
In index.ts, create PowerManager instance in app.whenReady()
Modify SyncManager to accept PowerManager reference
Call powerManager.startPreventingSleep() before sync batch
Call powerManager.stopPreventingSleep() after sync batch completes
On 'suspend' event, pause sync (already exists)
On 'resume' event, trigger immediate sync
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
Create apps/electron/src/main/settings.ts for app settings
Add getAutoLaunch() and setAutoLaunch(enabled: boolean) functions
Use app.setLoginItemSettings({ openAtLogin, openAsHidden: true })
Persist setting in electron-store or similar
Handle --hidden CLI arg to start minimized to tray
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
Check process.argv for '--hidden' flag in index.ts
If --hidden, don't call mainWindow.show() on startup
Ensure tray is still created and functional
Log startup mode for debugging
Test: app starts with no visible window when --hidden passed
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass
Create TrayManager.updateStatus(status: 'idle' | 'syncing' | 'error') method
Update tooltip based on status: 'PRM', 'PRM - Syncing...', 'PRM - Sync Error'
Optionally swap icon to indicate status (different icon for syncing)
Wire SyncManager events to TrayManager.updateStatus()
Show last sync time in tooltip or menu
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Add settings UI for background options
steps: Add Settings section to renderer UI (new route or modal)
Add toggle: 'Launch PRM at login'
Add toggle: 'Keep Mac awake while syncing'
Add toggle: 'Start minimized to menu bar'
Wire toggles to IPC calls to main process settings
Show current sync interval (read-only for now)
Verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint - must pass

tasks.description: Add unit tests for TrayManager and PowerManager
steps: Create apps/electron/src/main/__tests__/tray.test.ts
Test TrayManager.create() initializes without error
Test context menu items are present
Create apps/electron/src/main/__tests__/power.test.ts
Test startPreventingSleep/stopPreventingSleep toggle behavior
Mock electron APIs as needed
Verify: pnpm test - must pass
Build and run electron app: cd apps/electron && pnpm dev
Verify tray icon appears in menu bar
Verify clicking tray shows/hides window
Verify 'Sync Now' triggers immediate sync
Verify closing window hides to tray (not quit)
Verify 'Quit' actually quits the app
Test sleep/wake cycle: put Mac to sleep, wake, verify sync resumes
